title: MoveUnit
description: Request body for POST /players/me/units/{unitId}/move. Initiates timed movement to a target hex on the same planet.

planetId.description: Planet the unit currently occupies. Must match the unit's stored planetId.

targetHex.description: Axial hex coordinates of the destination.

targetPosition.description: Sub-hex position within the destination hex (x, y in [0, 1)). Defaults to {x: 0.5, y: 0.5} when omitted.
